notes: Production runtime intentionally remains CC7.5.25 legacy layered loader.
AdminKit Core is still side-by-side and not active globally in production webhook routing.
Core channels.home uses read-only data adapter and displays real channel title/post counts.
Core buttons.home now reads both new ak_post_buttons and legacy/raw button payloads from ak_posts.raw.
The buttons adapter is still SELECT-only and does not create, update, delete, or bind buttons.
Screen now shows source split: core=<n>, legacy=<n>, so we can locate where production buttons are stored.
The Add/Manage buttons actions in Core remain informational only; legacy button flow is untouched.
Batched access render and ack cleanup remain active.
Next migration step: redeploy, verify buttonsLegacyRawReadReady=true, open Core Кнопки and check whether legacy button counts appear.
